# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Full-object override copied from the active Forgotten Empires 3728581560 winner.
# Only Director delta: default AI empires avoid contacted foreign systems they cannot enter while at peace.
# Current access is evaluated by the native game rule; this stores no retry state and does not disable cloaking.

ai_should_restrict_system = {
    OR = {
        AND = {
            root = {
                is_country_type = default
            }
            exists = owner
            owner = {
                NOT = { is_same_value = root }
                has_communications = root
                NOT = { is_at_war_with = root }
            }
            NOT = { has_access_fleet = root }
        }
        AND = {
            root = { is_country_type = fallen_empire }
            exists = owner
            owner = { is_country_type = awakened_marauders }
        }
        AND = {
            root = { is_country_type = awakened_marauders }
            exists = owner
            owner = { is_country_type = fallen_empire }
        }
		AND = {
			root = { is_country_type = voidworms }
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				OR = {
					is_country_type = dormant_marauders
					is_country_type = awakened_marauders
				}
			}
		}
        AND = {
            root = {
                OR = {
                    is_country_type = fallen_empire
                    is_country_type = awakened_marauders
                    is_country_type = voidworms
                }
            }
            has_star_flag = guardian
            any_fleet_in_system = {
                exists = owner
                owner = {
                    is_guardian_country = yes
                }
            }
        }
        AND = {
            root = {
                OR = {
                    AND = {
                        is_crisis_faction = yes
                        # Gigastructural Engineering & More
                        inline_script = {
                            script = forgotten_empires/toggled_code
                            code = "
                                is_blokkat_country_type = no
                            "
                            toggle = @has_gigastructures
                        }
                    }
                    is_country_type = awakened_fallen_empire
                }
            }
            has_star_flag = guardian
            any_fleet_in_system = {
                exists = owner
                owner = {
                    is_country_type = guardian_fortress
                }
            }
        }
        # Forgotten Empires
        AND = {
            has_star_flag = scfe_ai_avoid_system
            NOT = { exists = owner }
        }
        # Ancient Empire
        inline_script = {
            script = forgotten_empires/toggled_code
            code = "
                AND = {
                    OR = {
                        has_star_flag = ag_zeta_crisis_psionic_storm_system
                        has_star_flag = ag_zeta_crisis_psionic_singularity_system
                    }
                    root = {
                        OR = {
                            is_country_type = default
                            is_country_type = fallen_empire
                            is_country_type = awakened_fallen_empire
                            is_crisis_faction = yes
                            is_country_type = awakened_marauders
                            is_country_type = ag_ancient_psi_guardian
                        }
                    }
                }
            "
            toggle = @ag_null_edict_length
        }
    }
}
